sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Enact Holdings (ACT) EVP receives additional restricted stock unit awards
feed.summary: Evan Stolove, EVP, General Counsel, and Secretary of Enact Holdings, Inc. (ACT), was granted three small awards of restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 19, 2026. These RSUs convert to common stock on a 1:1 basis and vest in three annual installments starting in 2025, 2026, and 2027. A portion of these awards are tied to dividend reinvestment from a quarterly dividend paid on the same date, representing routine compensation and not involving any share sales.

feed.title: Enact Holdings (ACT) director awarded 162 deferred stock units via dividend reinvestment
feed.summary: Enact Holdings director Westley V. Thompson was awarded 162 Deferred Stock Units with a value of $0.21 per share through a dividend reinvestment plan. This transaction, filed on a Form 4, increased his total holdings to 30,705.457 Deferred Stock Units. These units will be convertible into common stock one year after his termination of service as a director for the company.

feed.title: Fire ‘essentially out’ following explosion at Valero refinery near Texas coast
feed.summary: A fire at Valero Energy Corp.'s Port Arthur refinery, which followed an explosion on Monday evening, has been extinguished, and a shelter-in-place order for nearby residents has been lifted. The San Antonio-based company reported no recordable injuries among personnel, and air quality monitoring confirmed no threat to the community. The cause of the incident, which saw residents up to 11 miles away report their homes shaking, is currently under investigation.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Joseph Erlinger Sells Shares of McDonald's Corp (MCD)
feed.summary: Joseph Erlinger, President of McDonald's USA, recently sold 333 shares of McDonald's Corp (MCD) on March 23, 2026. This transaction is part of a pattern where Erlinger has sold 16,434 shares over the past year without any purchases. The stock is currently trading at $313.47 and is considered fairly valued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.97.

feed.title: NetApp Inc. stock faces pressure amid slowing AI data storage demand and enterprise spending caution
feed.summary: NetApp Inc. shares declined after its fiscal Q4 earnings revealed decelerating revenue growth and softer guidance, missing AI-driven expectations. The company reported $1.64 billion in revenue, up 5% year-over-year but below analyst consensus, signaling investor concerns over enterprise spending restraint and a maturing cloud market. Despite disciplined cost controls and strong AI workload momentum, the Q1 fiscal 2027 revenue outlook implies slower growth, leading analysts to cut price targets and highlighting questions about the velocity of AI monetization and hyperscaler capital expenditure.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group partners with Planet Water Foundation to boost safe water access in disaster zones
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has announced a partnership with Planet Water Foundation to enhance access to safe drinking water in communities affected by disasters. This initiative reflects the company's commitment to social responsibility, focusing on deploying clean water systems and educational programs in vulnerable areas. The collaboration addresses the global need for clean water and supports sustainable development efforts.

feed.title: Capital One Wins Again As Judge Dismisses Consumer Challenge To Discover Deal
feed.summary: A federal judge in California has dismissed a consumer antitrust lawsuit attempting to unravel Capital One's $35-billion acquisition of Discover, stating that consumers failed to plausibly demonstrate harm. This marks another legal victory for Capital One, whose merger with Discover received regulatory approval and closed last year. The plaintiffs have been granted one final opportunity to amend their complaint.

feed.title: PYPL'S Generic Risk Warnings Allegedly Failed Investors: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is investigating PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) for allegedly inadequate risk disclosures to investors between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. A class action lawsuit claims PayPal withheld specific, known problems while presenting confident financial targets, leading to a significant stock decline. The lawsuit argues that generic risk warnings are insufficient when a company possesses specific knowledge that contradicts its public projections.

feed.title: Hancock Whitney sets April 21 call to review Q1 2026 results
feed.summary: Hancock Whitney Corporation (Nasdaq: HWC) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, after the market closes. The company will host a conference call for analysts and investors at 3:30 p.m. Central time the same day to discuss the results, with a live webcast available on their investor relations website. An audio archive and replay of the call will also be accessible.

feed.title: Albemarle Corp. stock surges on Chinese lithium futures rally amid supply deficit forecasts
feed.summary: Albemarle Corp. (ALB) stock surged on the NYSE following a rally in Chinese lithium futures, driven by forecasts of future supply deficits in the EV battery materials sector. The company, a leading global lithium producer, is well-positioned to benefit from increased demand and higher spot prices, making it a critical watchpoint for investors interested in commodity recovery and the global electrification trend. Despite potential risks like price volatility and economic slowdowns, its strategic assets and US-centric operations offer a hedge against supply chain disruptions.

feed.title: The Mosaic Company stock faces pressure from falling phosphate prices and global fertilizer demand s
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company (NYSE: MOS) is experiencing pressure from declining global phosphate prices and a slowdown in fertilizer demand, with its stock impacted by weaker agricultural commodity prices. The company is responding by adjusting production, implementing cost controls, and leveraging its vertically integrated model and strong balance sheet to navigate the downturn. Investors are closely watching Mosaic's ability to manage commodity cycles and geopolitical factors affecting trade flows.

feed.title: Right-leaning Sarasota social media platform pursues deals with Netflix, Amazon Prime
feed.summary: Rumble Inc., a Sarasota-based streaming platform known for its conservative leanings, is reportedly in discussions for brand deals with major companies like Netflix and Amazon Prime. This move comes as the company continues to expand its reach, following a recent significant investment in AI technology. The platform was previously subject to boycotts due to its political alignment.

feed.title: Indian Cricket Team Sold for $1.78B to Blackstone, Bolt Ventures
feed.summary: The Royal Challengers Bengaluru of the Indian Premier League has been sold for approximately $1.78 billion. The acquiring investor group includes Blackstone, marking their first sports investment, as well as David Blitzer’s Bolt Ventures and Indian conglomerates Aditya Birla Group and The Times of India Group. The deal covers both men's and women's IPL franchises and awaits approval from cricket regulatory bodies.

feed.title: Bunge Global SA stock faces headwinds amid volatile ag commodity markets and merger integration challenges
feed.summary: Bunge Global SA stock is experiencing pressure due to volatile agricultural commodity markets, high input costs, and shifting global trade flows, despite its role in essential food supply chains. The ongoing integration of Viterra and concerns over commodity price swings, exacerbated by weather and geopolitical risks, are impacting margins. However, long-term tailwinds like biofuel demand and food security, along with strategic initiatives and diversification through its global network, offer resilience.

feed.title: Costco shares snap six-session losing streak
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation (COST) shares broke a six-session losing streak after experiencing a downturn. The stock, which had been performing well year-to-date, saw a 5.62% decline over the losing period, but rebounded with a 0.53% gain in the latest trading session to close at $707.97.

feed.title: Amazon, IBM Gets 2X ETF Treatment As Tradr Expands Single-Stock Bets
feed.summary: Tradr ETFs has launched a new set of four single-stock leveraged ETFs that provide either 200% long or -200% inverse daily exposure to selected individual equities, including Amazon.com Inc, IBM, Applied Optoelectronics Inc, and Hecla Mining Co. These products are designed for active traders and sophisticated investors, highlighting the growing demand for short-term trading tools despite the amplified risks associated with daily-reset leveraged ETFs. The launch adds to Tradr's portfolio of 64 leveraged ETFs, which collectively manage over $3 billion in assets.

feed.title: HighPeak Energy Inc stock faces pressure amid oil price volatility and production updates in Permian
feed.summary: HighPeak Energy Inc, a Permian-focused oil producer, reported steady Q4 output but anticipates capital expenditure adjustments due to dipping WTI crude prices. Despite a volatile energy market and macroeconomic headwinds, the company is focused on low-cost drilling, operational efficiency, and debt reduction. HighPeak's strong balance sheet, extensive drilling inventory, and low geopolitical exposure make it an attractive consideration for US investors seeking Permian pure-play exposure.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase (AMJB) issues $2.1M callable notes, 5.15% coupon, 2039 maturity
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has issued $2.1 million in callable fixed-rate notes with a 5.15% annual coupon, maturing on March 24, 2039. The notes, priced on March 20, 2026, pay annual interest starting March 24, 2027, and are redeemable by JPMorgan in whole on specific dates between March 24, 2028, and September 24, 2038. Investors should be aware of the credit risk associated with JPMorgan Chase & Co. and the notes' unsecured status within potential resolution scenarios.

feed.title: Old Dominion Freight Line stock faces valuation scrutiny amid institutional buying and Q4 earnings b
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) reported Q4 earnings that beat estimates with strong EPS and revenue, despite a decline in freight volumes. Institutional investors like Murphy Middleton Hinkle & Parker Inc. showed confidence by increasing their holdings, even as valuation models suggest the stock might be overvalued. The company's stock performance and valuation metrics show a P/E ratio exceeding industry averages, and while it has institutional support, a DCF analysis suggests an overvaluation, prompting debate among investors regarding its future growth trajectory in the cyclical LTL freight sector.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics Inc. stock gains traction amid rising US raw steel production and fresh institutional
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics Inc. (STLD) is gaining investor attention due to resilient US raw steel production, which increased 0.4% week-over-week and 4.6% year-over-year. Institutional buying, such as a 10,000-share purchase by Murphy Middleton Hinkle & Parker Inc., further boosts confidence. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.53, reinforcing its commitment to shareholder returns amidst a recovering steel market.

feed.title: Antitrust Agenda: HPE/Juniper Tunney Act Hearing Set for 1pm ET Today; State Attorneys General Group Signals Need for Companies to Cooperate on Merger Investigations; Analysis of Past Comments from Fertilizer Executives Amid Price Spikes; Acting DO
feed.summary: A Tunney Act hearing for the HPE/Juniper merger settlement is scheduled for 1 PM ET today, with state attorneys general challenging the proposed settlement. Separately, a coalition of progressive state AGs is urging companies to cooperate with merger investigations, highlighting their intent to act when federal enforcement is perceived as weak. The article also provides a detailed analysis of past comments from fertilizer executives, suggesting potential anti-competitive behavior amidst recent price spikes and ongoing investigations into the market.

feed.title: Officer reports sale of 3,250 shares | VTOL SEC Filing - Form 144
feed.summary: Lorin L. Brass reported the sale of 3,250 shares of Bristow Group Inc. (VTOL) common stock, yielding proceeds of $159,380. The Form 144 filing also indicated that 1,000 restricted shares vested on October 31, 2023, under a registered plan. A securities compliance analyst described the filing as a routine resale, noting that it did not specify the timing or method of the sale, nor whether it was an open-market transaction or part of a pre-arranged plan.

feed.title: Trading the Move, Not the Narrative: (APRZ) Edition
feed.summary: This article analyzes Trueshares Structured Outcome (APRZ) ETF, highlighting weak near and mid-term sentiment but a positive long-term outlook. It provides specific trading strategies (Position, Momentum Breakout, Risk Hedging) and multi-timeframe signal analysis generated by AI models, advising investors on potential entry and exit points.

feed.title: D.R. Horton Inc. stock faces sector headwinds as peers like Lennar and KB Home report sharp Q1 decli
feed.summary: D.R. Horton Inc. is navigating a challenging housing market as its competitors, Lennar and KB Home, report significant Q1 declines due to high mortgage rates and affordability issues. Lennar missed revenue expectations by 4.5% in Q1 CY2026, while KB Home anticipates a 65% EPS drop for fiscal Q1 2026. The article highlights the broader sector's vulnerabilities and the need for strategic pricing and inventory management amidst persistent demand pressures and macro-economic concerns.

feed.title: Director’s TEGNA (NYSE: TGNA) shares and RSUs cashed out at $22 in Nexstar merger
feed.summary: TEGNA Inc. director Catherine Dunleavy's shares and restricted stock units (RSUs) were cashed out at $22 per share due to the company's merger with Nexstar Media Group. This transaction involved 9,142 RSUs and 8,230.83 shares of common stock, which were converted into cash as per the merger agreement. These dispositions were not open-market sales but a required step reflecting the terms of the merger, meaning Dunleavy no longer holds these specific equity positions in TEGNA.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips CEO Urges U.S. to Protect Middle East Assets
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips CEO Ryan Lance is urging the Trump administration to expand its protection efforts in the Middle East to include U.S. oil-and-gas assets. The company has significant investments in Qatari facilities and had to evacuate nonessential staff recently. Lance emphasized the importance of protecting these assets during a recent energy conference.

feed.title: Entergy Corp. stock benefits from stable utility cash flows amid 2026 energy transition pressures
feed.summary: Entergy Corp. (ETR) is highlighted as a strong defensive play for US investors, benefiting from stable cash flows generated by its regulated utility operations in the Gulf South. The company's investment in grid infrastructure and nuclear plants, coupled with increasing power demand from data centers and electrification, positions it for growth despite regulatory and commodity risks. Entergy's consistent dividend growth and low market correlation make it an attractive option for income-focused portfolios.

feed.title: JPMorgan lowers its price target on Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) to $400 from $410
feed.summary: JPMorgan has revised its price target for Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) downwards to $400 from the previous $410. This signals a slightly less optimistic outlook from the financial institution regarding the company's future stock performance.

feed.title: Gilat Satellite Networks (GILT) Announces Cloud-Based Virtualized Satellite Modem Demonstration with AWS
feed.summary: Gilat Satellite Networks (GILT) announced a joint demonstration of a cloud-based virtualized satellite modem with AWS, SES Space and Defense, and the WAVE Consortium at Satellite 2026. This demonstration will showcase modem functionality delivered via software for greater flexibility and scalability in defense SATCOM networks. Additionally, Gilat DataPath secured approximately $6 million in new orders from the U.S. Army for field and technical services under the GTACS II contract.

feed.title: Don't Ignore The Insider Selling In Southern
feed.summary: Recent insider selling at The Southern Company by Executive VP & COO Stanley Connally and Chairman Kimberly Greene raised some concern, although the sales happened near the current stock price. Despite these sales, insiders still maintain a 0.1% ownership, valued at US$134 million, which is generally seen as a positive sign of alignment with shareholders. The article notes that while insider sales are present, there haven't been any insider purchases recently, prompting a recommendation to review the company's "warning signs" before investing.

feed.title: Rollins Inc. stock faces pressure amid slowing pest control demand and margin squeeze in Q4 2025 ear
feed.summary: Rollins Inc. reported Q4 2025 earnings showing a slowdown in revenue growth to 6.8% and EBITDA margins contracting to 21.2%, primarily due to weaker residential demand amid high interest rates. The company's stock dipped on the NYSE, reflecting investor concerns over margin compression and consumer discretionary exposure. Despite near-term challenges, Rollins Inc. is pursuing long-term growth through acquisitions, international expansion, and a resilient recurring revenue model, with analysts noting its financial flexibility and strong market position.

feed.title: AES Corporation Advances Renewable Energy Portfolio with New Utility-Scale Solar Projects in 2026
feed.summary: AES Corporation is significantly expanding its renewable energy portfolio by initiating several new utility-scale solar projects across the US. These projects, including major facilities in Texas, California, and Ohio, aim to address increasing electricity demands from data centers and electrification trends, aligning with national decarbonization goals. Utilized advanced technologies like bifacial solar panels and battery storage, these developments are expected to drive AES's financial growth and solidify its position as a key player in the clean energy transition.

feed.title: Dominion Produces First Power From Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind Project
feed.summary: Dominion Energy has begun producing power from its Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind (CVOW) project, with the first commercial turbine now operational and supplying 14.7 megawatts to the grid. This marks a significant milestone for what is projected to be America's largest offshore wind farm, despite previous federal stop-work orders and increased costs due to tariffs and delays. The project is currently 70% complete and is expected to power 660,000 homes by its estimated completion in early 2027.

feed.title: Teledyne Technologies stock gains spotlight as growth pick amid analyst upgrades and SATShow Week 20
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies (ISIN: US8793601050) is gaining investor attention due to recent analyst price target increases and a high-profile demonstration at SATShow Week 2026. The company, operating in high-tech sectors like instrumentation, digital imaging, aerospace, and defense, is positioned as a resilient growth pick for US investors. Its diversified portfolio and strong positioning in growth markets are seen as key drivers for its momentum.

feed.title: Why Salesforce Plunged Again Today
feed.summary: Salesforce (NYSE: CRM) shares dropped by 5.8% today after artificial intelligence company Anthropic released a new agentic capability for its Claude models. This new functionality, which allows AI agents to take over computer tasks, has raised fears that AI could disrupt traditional enterprise software. Despite these concerns, Salesforce has a strategic partnership and a 1% ownership stake in Anthropic, potentially mitigating the long-term impact on the company.

feed.title: Invesco Limited Term California Municipal Fund Q4 2025 Commentary
feed.summary: The Invesco Limited Term California Municipal Fund Class A shares (OLCAX) at net asset value outperformed its style-specific index in Q4 2025. The fund focuses on shorter maturities and revenue bonds, with key exposures in airports, public power, and higher education. The positive outlook for the fund is supported by attractive municipal yields, healthy state and local budgets, and anticipated Fed rate cuts.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Has Lowered Expectations for Tyson Foods (NYSE:TSN) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has reduced its price target for Tyson Foods (NYSE:TSN) from $67 to $65, maintaining a "neutral" rating despite the company's recent earnings miss. The analyst consensus for Tyson Foods remains a "Hold" with an average price target of $64.09, reflecting caution due to valuation concerns, including a high PE ratio of approximately 109. Tyson Foods recently reported earnings of $0.97 per share, missing the consensus estimate, although revenue surpassed expectations with 5.1% year-over-year sales growth.

feed.title: Databricks recognized as a Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Analytics and BI
feed.summary: Databricks has been named a Customers’ Choice in the Gartner® Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Analytics and Business Intelligence Platforms for 2025. The company received a 4.8 out of 5-star rating and a 94% willingness-to-recommend score from 167 verified customer reviews. This recognition highlights the strong adoption of Databricks AI/BI and validates its native, AI-powered approach to analytics.

feed.title: FedEx Freight spin-off on track as company focuses on yield growth and long-term value
feed.summary: FedEx announced that the spin-off of its less-than-truckload (LTL) subsidiary, FedEx Freight, remains on track for June 1, aiming to unlock long-term value for stockholders. Despite a challenging LTL market and a 5% revenue decrease in fiscal Q3 for FedEx Freight, the company is focused on yield growth, high-value shipments, and an improving pricing environment. This separation will make FedEx Freight a separately traded public company, listed on the NYSE under FDXF.

feed.title: Equifax Inc. stock faces renewed scrutiny amid congressional data privacy debates and AI hiring push
feed.summary: Equifax Inc. is under heightened scrutiny from investors as congressional data privacy debates intensify and the company aggressively pursues AI-driven growth. Lawmakers are questioning the disparate regulatory oversight between banks and credit bureaus like Equifax, potentially leading to new compliance costs. Amidst these regulatory challenges, Equifax is actively hiring for AI roles, aiming to leverage artificial intelligence for enhanced operations and revenue, while also navigating operational risks highlighted by recent litigation concerning credit report pulls.

feed.title: Natural Gas ‘Headwinds Have Become Tailwinds’ Amid Iran War, Says ConocoPhillips CEO
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips CEO Ryan Lance states that global natural gas futures are likely to remain elevated due to the ongoing Iran war and limited production, turning previous headwinds into tailwinds. The article highlights that while international benchmarks like TTF and JKM show elevated forward curves, North American natural gas prices, particularly in the Permian Basin, are experiencing oversupply and negative pricing, creating a significant disconnect despite rising global prices. Geopolitical events are driving a structural floor for gas prices, reinforcing the long-term outlook for higher global costs.

feed.title: CMS Energy Stock Faces Pressure Amid Michigan Rate Hike and Data Center Boom Challenges
feed.summary: CMS Energy is facing investor scrutiny due to rising interest costs, increasing power demands from Michigan's data center expansion, and regulatory challenges regarding its latest rate case. The utility seeks a $362 million revenue increase to fund grid modernization and accommodate growing data center loads, with investor reaction and potential regulatory outcomes influencing future earnings. Despite solid fundamentals, the company's valuation reflects Michigan-specific risks, highlighting the importance of regulatory support for its ambitious capex plans.

feed.title: 3M Company stock gains momentum amid turnaround efforts with new CEO Brown and Bain Capital joint ve
feed.summary: 3M Company stock is garnering renewed investor interest due to leadership changes and strategic partnerships, including a joint venture with Bain Capital and new CEO Mike Brown's initiatives. The company is focusing on operational improvements, cost-cutting, and divesting non-core assets to streamline operations and unlock value. These efforts, combined with favorable broader industrial trends, signal potential recovery and growth prospects for 3M.

feed.title: UTPB bringing ConocoPhillips Small Biz Builder program to Monahans
feed.summary: The University of Texas Permian Basin (UTPB) is launching the second year of its ConocoPhillips Small Biz Builder program in Monahans on April 28, supported by a $150,000 grant. This six-week program offers hands-on training, mentorship, and financial tools to local entrepreneurs and small business owners in the Permian Basin to help them build stronger, more sustainable businesses. Additional cohorts are planned for Midland and Hobbs, New Mexico, following the success of the 2025 sessions which saw 45 graduates.

feed.title: Tapestry Inc. stock faces ongoing uncertainty in luxury retail amid quiet market conditions and hiring signals
feed.summary: Tapestry Inc., parent company of luxury brands like Coach and Kate Spade, is actively hiring for sales and management roles in the US and Europe, indicating operational stability despite general challenges in the consumer sector. This hiring drive suggests confidence in near-term foot traffic and the company's ability to capture market share in the accessible luxury segment. While no disruptive corporate announcements have been made recently, investors should monitor demand trends and consider the risks associated with consumer confidence and international exposure.

feed.title: Healthcare Services Group convenes national meeting to advance hiring strategy and candidate experience
feed.summary: Healthcare Services Group recently held a national meeting for its Divisional Staffing Coordinators to optimize its hiring approach and enhance candidate experience. The team collaborated to improve talent acquisition processes, though specific changes to the strategy have not been disclosed. This initiative aims to foster collaboration and implement actionable improvements in recruitment for the company.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc Stock (C) Moved Up by 3.98% on Mar 24: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. (C) stock rose by 3.98% on March 24, driven primarily by securing a significant BlackRock mandate to provide middle office services for approximately $4 trillion in ETF assets. This positive movement is further supported by strong analyst sentiment, including "Buy" ratings and upward-revised price targets, and the company's strategic initiatives focused on increasing net interest income and improving efficiency. Despite some intraday volatility due to macroeconomic uncertainties, company-specific news and analyst confidence propelled the stock's performance.

feed.title: Lagging Food Stock Looks for a Post-Earnings Reprieve
feed.summary: Conagra Brands Inc (CAG) is set to report its fiscal third-quarter earnings on April 1, with the stock currently near 16-year lows despite a recent attempt at a bounce. The options market is pricing in a larger-than-average move post-earnings, and there is significant bearish sentiment from options traders and short sellers. An unwinding of this pessimism or analyst upgrades could provide a boost to the stock.

feed.title: Apple may launch standalone Siri app, 'Ask Siri' button in iOS 27: report (AAPL:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Apple is reportedly planning to launch a standalone Siri app and an "Ask Siri" button in its upcoming iOS 27, aiming to introduce a more personalized version of its digital assistant. This move follows a delay last year and is expected to leverage generative AI and multimodal inputs to enhance Siri's capabilities, allowing it to access user data across devices and complete tasks within apps. Apple is also utilizing partnerships, including Google Gemini AI models, to bolster its AI development for Siri.

feed.title: [10-K] SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA EDISON Co Files Annual Report
feed.summary: SCE Recovery Funding LLC, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Southern California Edison Company (SCE), has filed its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The report details the company's structure, management team, and various agreements related to recovery property, while largely omitting standard sections like financial data and risk factors as per General Instruction J of Form 10-K. It also lists key Exhibits including certifications and compliance reports related to servicing criteria for asset-backed issuers.
